title: Small Volume Fungal Genomic DNA Extraction Protocol for Illumina Genome
author: Jana M U'Ren
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.3w9gph6
materials: Carefully pour off ethanol into glass beaker.

steps.title: Pre-measure SDS Buffer need for all samples (e
steps.instruction: Pre-measure SDS Buffer need for all samples (e.g. 500uL SDS Buffer x 3 samples= 1,500uL) into a 5 mL tube. 500uL SDS Buffer x ______samples = _______________uL of SDS Buffer pre-aliquoted

steps.title: Bead beat tissue frozen tissue via...
steps.instruction: Bead beat tissue frozen tissue via one 15 second cycle at 1400 RPM in frozen aluminum block. If samples are properly homogenized, remove from bead beater and place in -20C ice box. Repeat one 15 second cycle grinding until homogenization has occurred. Note: The samples might have to be dropped in liquid nitrogen, or have liquid nitrogen poured over them to ensure the samples don’t thaw during the grinding process.

steps.title: Add 500uL SDS Buffer to each sample. Note
steps.instruction: Add 500uL SDS Buffer to each sample. Note: Vortex gently if needed to homogenize sample in SDS Buffer.

steps.title: Incubate at 65°C for 15 minutes,...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65°C for 15 minutes, gently inverting sample 5 times every 5 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge samples at maximum speed (14,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples at maximum speed (14,000 RPM) at 4°C for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Invert the samples 20X to mix until “milky white
steps.instruction: Invert the samples 20X to mix until “milky white.”

steps.title: Spin tube at maximum speed at 4°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin tube at maximum speed at 4°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: In chemical fume hood, carefully remove...
steps.instruction: In chemical fume hood, carefully remove the aqueous layer with 200uL pipette, do not disturb the interface. Place respectively into new 1.5mL microcentrifuge tubes. (The smaller aperture of the 200 ul tips makes it easier to remove the aqueous layer without disturbing the layer below).

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.3X volume of absolute molecular grade ethanol to each tube. This high-salt, low ethanol mixture precipitates the excess polysaccharides while gDNA remains in solution. ____________uL supernatant x 0.3= _______________uL of ethanol

steps.title: Spin at maximum speed at 4°C for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin at maximum speed at 4°C for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Carefully remove the supernatant without disturbing the polysaccharide pellet
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the supernatant without disturbing the polysaccharide pellet. Place supernatant into a new 1.5mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.7X volume of absolute molecular grade ethanol to each tube. The gDNA can be seen as falling out of solution as long strands of gDNA. ____________uL supernatant x 1.7= _______________uL of ethanol

steps.title: Spin tube at maximum speed at 4°C for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin tube at maximum speed at 4°C for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 mL of 70% ethanol to remove the excess salt, do not disturb the pellet.

steps.title: Spin the tube at maximum speed...
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at maximum speed at 4°C for 1 minute.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 mL of 70% ethanol to remove the excess salt, do not disturb the pellet.

steps.title: Spin the tube at maximum speed...
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at maximum speed at 4°C for 1 minute.

steps.title: Quick spin tube with pellet to...
steps.instruction: Quick spin tube with pellet to gather residual ethanol at the bottom of the tube and carefully remove with a P20 tip.

steps.title: Let the pellet air dry for...
steps.instruction: Let the pellet air dry for 5 minutes at room temperature in the biosafety cabinet, taking care not to over dry.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 50uL low salt TE. Note
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 50uL low salt TE. Note: Increase volume of low salt TE of 10uL if pellet does not resuspend.

steps.title: Dilute samples 1:10 and use dilution...
steps.instruction: Dilute samples 1:10 and use dilution to Nanodrop and Qubit samples. Record quantification and purity values with chart below. %s %s Sample nameNanodrop 1:10 ng/uLQubit 1:10 ng/uLQubit ng/uL260/280260/230Total TE (uL)Total DNA (ug)

steps.title: Add 2 uL RNase A and...
steps.instruction: Add 2 uL RNase A and place in 37°C for 1 hour.

steps.title: Carefully remove the supernatant (~500ul) without disturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the supernatant (~500ul) without disturbing the pellet. Place in a new, labeled 1.5mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: In the chemical fume hood, add...
steps.instruction: In the chemical fume hood, add 500uL of Phenol:Chloroform:IAA (or 1:1 of supernatant to P:C:IAA) to each tube of supernatant.
